explanation: Study [40445171] suggests isolated hyperparasitaemia is not an independent risk factor for critical disease, whereas [41077038] identifies parasitemia >5% as an independent risk factor for artesunate treatment failure.
The evidence for treatment failure risk scoring [41077038] is derived from a South Korean cohort and may not extrapolate to endemic populations.

Study [36367444] focuses on mosquito habitat modification for malaria control (preventative/public health) and does not provide evidence for the clinical efficacy of artesunate versus quinine in treating severe malaria.
Some cited evidence may not directly match the target adult human population.
